meaning: n.恐怖主义,恐怖统治,恐怖行动
examples: We need to unite against terrorism.
I am utterly opposed to any form of terrorism.
The government is taking a firm line on terrorism.
He was tried and found guilty in his absence of terrorism offences in Jordan in 1999.
Bergen is currently writing a book about "homegrown" terrorism, which HBO is basing a forthcoming film on.
